section_name: Sale of Motor Vehicles on Consecutive Saturday and Sunday Prohibited
chapter_title: Sale or Transfer of Motor Vehicles & Master Keys
text:
(a) A person may not, on consecutive days of Saturday and Sunday:

(1) sell or offer for sale a motor vehicle; or

(2) compel an employee to sell or offer for sale a motor vehicle.

(b) Each day a motor vehicle is offered for sale is a separate violation. Each sale of a motor vehicle is a separate violation.

(c) This section does not prohibit the occasional sale of a motor vehicle by a person not in a business that includes the sale of motor vehicles.

(d) This section does not prohibit the quoting of a price for a motor home or tow truck at a show or exhibition described by Section 2301.358 (Vehicle Show or Exhibition) , Occupations Code.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 728. Sale or Transfer of Motor Vehicles & Master Keys
##### § 728.002 — Sale of Motor Vehicles on Consecutive Saturday and Sunday Prohibited

(a) A person may not, on consecutive days of Saturday and Sunday:

    (1) sell or offer for sale a motor vehicle; or

    (2) compel an employee to sell or offer for sale a motor vehicle.

(b) Each day a motor vehicle is offered for sale is a separate violation. Each sale of a motor vehicle is a separate violation.

(c) This section does not prohibit the occasional sale of a motor vehicle by a person not in a business that includes the sale of motor vehicles.

(d) This section does not prohibit the quoting of a price for a motor home or tow truck at a show or exhibition described by Section 2301.358 (Vehicle Show or Exhibition) , Occupations Code.

*Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1135 (H.B.2741), Sec. 132, eff. September 1, 2013.*
